escalation.rationale: US-Iran conflict continues with extended ceasefire but maintained naval blockade, Strait of Hormuz remains mined, and multiple active conflicts across regions.

ticker_items: Trump extends Iran ceasefire at Pakistan's request but maintains blockade
Pentagon: Strait of Hormuz clearance could take six months
Russia takes ~1,700 sq km Ukrainian territory this year
Iran casualty toll reaches 3,375 dead, Lebanon 2,294 dead
Germany considers raising military conscription age to 70

eastern_europe.description: Russian Kinzhal hypersonic missiles flew near Chornobyl nuclear site risking major accident
Ukraine penetrated Russian territory using drones targeting civilians
Russia continues spring offensive with drone and missile strikes on civilian areas.

middle_east.description: Israel killed journalist Amal Khalil and injured Zeinab Faraj in targeted double-tap attack
Iranian forces seized two container ships and fired on a third vessel in crucial trade route.

claimed_totals.claim: Gulf states deaths from Iran war

ukraine.text: Russian hypersonic Kinzhal missiles since the invasion have been on the flight path near both the Chornobyl site and western Ukraine's Khmelnytskyi nuclear plant
ukraine.speaker: Ruslan Kravchenko
ukraine.title: Ukraine's top state prosecutor

middle_east.text: I am extending the ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request while awaiting a unified proposal from Tehran
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: NATO wasn't there when we needed them, and they won't be there if we need them
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: NATO WASN'T THERE WHEN WE NEEDED THEM, AND THEY WON'T BE THERE IF WE NEED THEM
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Pakistan successfully requested Trump extend the Iran ceasefire to allow more time for peace negotiations. Vice President JD Vance is reportedly planning a trip to Pakistan as part of diplomatic efforts.

North Korea and Russia held ceremony marking completion of their first road bridge connection, set to open this summer. Russia's interior minister visited Pyongyang to discuss strengthened law enforcement cooperation.

Germany called for only symbolic EU benefits for Ukraine excluding farming subsidies and voting rights. German reservist chief suggests raising military service age limit to 70 as people stay fit longer.

EU ambassadors approved a 90 billion euro loan package for Ukraine after Hungary lifted its veto following Orban's defeat. The bloc also approved new sanctions against Russia and continues military support despite US focus shifting to Iran conflict.

China denied reports that Iran used Chinese-built satellites to target US bases during Operation Epic Fury. US lawmakers accused China of increasing aggression in Indo-Pacific while South Korea faces congressional criticism for allegedly favoring Chinese businesses.

financial.notes: Strait of Hormuz crisis described as greatest threat to global economy, with six-month timeline for clearing Iranian mines impacting oil trade routes.

update_log.text: Trump extends Iran ceasefire at Pakistan's request while maintaining naval blockade
Pentagon assessment reveals six-month timeline needed to clear Strait of Hormuz mines
Al Jazeera reports Iranian leadership debating war and peace after ceasefire extension
Reports indicate Russia has taken approximately 1,700 square kilometers of Ukrainian territory this year
Iran seizes two container ships and fires on third vessel in Strait of Hormuz
Trump extends Iran ceasefire at Pakistan's request but maintains naval blockade
EU approves 90 billion euro loan package for Ukraine after Hungary lifts veto
Russia continues spring offensive with intensified attacks on Ukrainian positions
Trump extends Iran ceasefire indefinitely while maintaining US naval blockade of Iranian ports
UN inspectors report Iran has accumulated uranium stockpile sufficient for 10-11 nuclear weapons
Multiple protesters stabbed at London rally against Iran war according to video evidence
Israel kills journalist Amal Khalil in targeted attack in south Lebanon
